hooks.command: bash -c 'if grep -rn "deleteMany\|updateMany" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" src/ 2>/dev/null; then echo "ERROR: Bulk DB operations (deleteMany/updateMany) are not allowed. Use single-record operations." && exit 1; fi && if grep -rn "\$queryRaw\|\$executeRaw\|sql\`" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" src/ 2>/dev/null; then echo "ERROR: Raw SQL detected. Use Prisma ORM only." && exit 1; fi'
